_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Triglyceride stores were significantly reduced in Nf1 P1 mutants compared to controls (Fig. 5a).
details: Significantly reduced triglyceride stores compared to controls (p = 0.002, Mann-Whitney, n = 9-10)
